title: LLM Hallucination Pattern Sample
description: Schema for submitting anonymized real-world instances of LLM code hallucination patterns

id.description: Unique sample ID: <system-name>-<NNN>. System name must be anonymized.

pattern_id.description: Pattern category and number, e.g. H1, SD2, AC3

severity.description: Impact severity when this pattern occurred in production

discovery_phase.description: Where in the SDLC this was discovered

llm_model.description: Optional: model that generated the code (e.g. 'gpt-4o', 'claude-3.5-sonnet')

trigger.description: One sentence: what LLM action or prompt context caused this pattern

symptom.description: What the engineer observed first — the visible symptom, not root cause

bad_code.description: Anonymized Python snippet showing the bad pattern. No private names.

good_code.description: The correct version. Must be fully anonymized.

detection_command.description: Shell command or ruff rule that would have caught this

notes.description: Optional additional context, cross-references, or caveats
